provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Traditional Liquor (Imposition of Tax) Order and shall come into operation on the fifteenth day of June, 1973.

The sales tax imposed on spirits manufactured by the distillation of traditional liquor shall be deemed to be tax required to be imposed on such spirits by section 24 of the Traditional Liquor (Control of Distillation) Act 1 . 1 Cap. 384

[Revokes the Konyagi (Imposition of Sales Tax) Order 2 .] 2 G.N.
